name: FINEOS Insurance Core Systems API
what_it_does: FINEOS REST API for group benefits, disability claims, absence management, and life insurance policy administration. Enables AI agents to manage group benefits policy administration for employer group insurance workflow, handle disability claims intake and management for STD/LTD claims processing automation, access FMLA and leave management integration for employer leave compliance, retrieve absence pattern analysis for integrated disability management, manage return-to-work workflow for disability claims resolution, handle life insurance claims processing for beneficiary payment automation, access group benefits billing and premium collection for insurance revenue management, retrieve analytics and compliance reporting for group benefits program management, manage integration with HRIS and payroll for employer benefits data exchange, and automate ERISA group benefits compliance and reporting workflow.
use_cases: Processing disability claims from benefits administration agents
Managing FMLA leave from HR compliance agents
Administering group life from insurance operations agents
Reporting ERISA compliance from benefits regulatory agents
not_for: Individual health insurance without group benefits context
P&C insurance without group benefits and disability focus
Small employers without group insurance carrier integration
best_when: A group insurance carrier or third-party administrator using FINEOS wants AI agents to automate disability claims, absence management, FMLA compliance, and group benefits administration.
avoid_when: ADA/FMLA LEGAL RISK: Automated disability claims and leave management intersects with ADA interactive process and FMLA compliance — automated adverse decisions on accommodation or leave eligibility without human HR and legal review creates ADA and FMLA liability. ERISA fiduciary — group benefits claim decisions are ERISA fiduciary decisions; automated claim denial without proper ERISA claims procedures (full and fair review, timely decision, appeal rights) creates ERISA breach and DOL enforcement risk. HIPAA PHI — disability and leave management contains medical certification and diagnosis information; HIPAA BAA required for all FINEOS integrations accessing medical information.

auth.notes: FINEOS uses OAuth 2.0. REST API with JSON. Dublin, Ireland HQ. Founded 1993 by Michael Kelly. Public (FNXS ASX). FINEOS is the market-leading core system for group benefits and disability insurance. Major carrier customers include Unum, Sun Life, Voya, and Lincoln. Competes with Majesco and Guidewire for group benefits administration.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription
pricing.notes: Dublin, Ireland. Founded 1993. Public (FNXS ASX). Group benefits and disability insurance market leader. Major carrier customers (Unum, Sun Life, Voya). Competes with Majesco for group benefits admin.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented per enterprise integration

known_agent_gotchas: ERISA FIDUCIARY CLAIM DECISION: Group benefits claim decisions are ERISA fiduciary decisions; automated denial without ERISA-compliant claims procedures (timely decision, specific reasons, appeal rights) creates ERISA breach and DOL enforcement risk

ADA INTERACTIVE PROCESS: Automated disability accommodation decisions must not bypass ADA interactive process; accommodation denial without engaging in good-faith interactive process with employee creates ADA liability

FMLA serious health condition definition — automated FMLA leave approval/denial requires correct serious health condition determination; automated denial of qualifying leave creates FMLA retaliation risk and DOL complaint

HIPAA medical information — disability claims and medical certification contains PHI; HIPAA BAA required for all FINEOS integrations; automated access to medical certification data must implement minimum-necessary standard

ERISA claims timing requirements — group disability claims have strict ERISA timeline requirements (45 days initial decision, 45 day extension, 60-90 days appeal); automated workflow must track and enforce regulatory deadlines

STD to LTD transition — short-term disability to long-term disability transition involves different eligibility criteria and definitions of disability; automated benefit continuation must correctly apply definition change at transition
agent_readiness.security_notes: Group benefits and disability. SOC2, ISO27001, HIPAA. OAuth2. US/EU/AU. Medical and disability claims data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Group benefits insurance. SOC2, ISO27001, HIPAA. OAuth2. US/EU/AU. Medical and disability data.
